no data are collected at the time of the transaction to indicate the actual beneficiary experience). The 
maximum number of tiers varied by year. The largest number of tiers was 9 (in 2007). From 2011–
2020, only up to six tiers are possible; starting in 2021 plans are allowed to have up to seven tiers. The
